Gap Description: No documentation on CI/CD integrations such as GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Jenkins for automatically creating or updating zipBoard issues and tasks.
Suggested Title: CI/CD Integration Guide for Automated Issue Creation

Gap Description: Absence of a guide on performing WCAG accessibility audits within zipBoard, including how to run accessibility tests and interpret results.
Missing troubleshooting steps for users encountering ad‑blockers or browser extensions that prevent the zipBoard extension or annotation tools from functioning.
Suggested Title: Resolving Ad‑Blocker and Extension Issues with zipBoard

Gap Description: Lack of detailed documentation on Single Sign‑On (SSO) configuration (SAML, OAuth) and IP whitelisting settings for Enterprise accounts.
Suggested Title: Enterprise SSO and Whitelisting Configuration Guide

Gap Description: Insufficient examples and reference material on using webhooks and the zipBoard API for custom automation workflows, including rate limiting and error handling.
